missionDesc: To support meaningful progress through considered services grounded in professionalism, discretion, and international awareness. We bring clarity and structure to complex processes, combining careful attention with a global perspective.
academyDesc: Structured language programmes and personal development courses designed to support individual growth and skill building.
diplomacyDesc: Advisory and coordination support for parties navigating sensitive discussions or cross border engagements.
translationDesc: Professional translation services and multilingual assistance delivered with care and attention to detail.
tradeDesc: We coordinate cross-border commerce between the EU and the Middle East and North Africa, connecting businesses with sourcing, logistics, and market entry support.
priveDesc: Discreet, individually arranged services for clients who require a high degree of privacy and personalised attention.
digitalDesc: Website development, brand identity projects, and digital presence support for individuals and organisations.
voiceDesc: Multilingual narration and audio production services for commercial and creative projects.
connectDesc: B2B representation support and partnership development coordination for businesses seeking new markets.
eduConnectDesc: Guidance and application support for students exploring university options abroad. Admission decisions remain with institutions.
realEstateDesc: Guidance and coordination for those exploring property options, whether for residence or investment, with our role strictly advisory.
adminServicesDesc: Support for navigating official Polish procedures including driving licences, vehicle registration, PESEL, meldunek, and company formation, with outcomes determined by relevant authorities.
eleganceDesc: A considered approach to communication and presentation, informed by clarity and understated professionalism.
trustDesc: Developed through consistent work, discretion, and long standing professional relationships.
purposeDesc: We work selectively, focusing on engagements where our involvement can be genuinely constructive.
statsDisclaimer: These figures reflect our activity to date. For references or detailed examples, please request a private overview.
mapDesc: Locations and partners we have collaborated with.
testimonial1: "Cravelle brought clarity and a sense of direction to our project. Their approach was thoughtful and well organised." - M. Karam
testimonial2: "Professional, attentive, and easy to work with. Each step of the process was handled carefully." - 2H Company
testimonial3: "Working with Cravelle gave me structure and confidence in developing my professional presence." - O. Mohammed
aboutUsText:
Cravelle was established in 2025 with a straightforward intention: to provide considered support in a landscape that often feels rushed. In an environment shaped by competing priorities and constant information, we focus on clarity, thoughtful structure, and human attention.

We believe care shows in the details and that professionalism should feel measured, not overwhelming. Our work is guided by precision, integrity, and a commitment to experiences that feel purposeful.

Cravelle does not follow passing trends. We aim to set a consistent standard and continue refining it.
news1Title: United Property and Invest Show Participation
news1Excerpt: Cravelle International Trade supported international real estate developers at the United Property and Invest Show, assisting with presentation and coordination for Pontus, Silk Towers, and Pafilia.
news2Excerpt: We coordinated exhibition presence for Silk Towers and other international developments at major property events, supporting investor introductions.
news3Excerpt: Cravelle attended the Polish Portuguese Chamber of Commerce Property Forum, supporting dialogue between international business contacts.
faq1Q: What areas does Cravelle focus on?
faq1A: We provide support across education, advisory services, translation, international trade coordination, and confidential consulting. Our role is to assist and guide rather than to deliver outcomes that depend on third parties.
faq2Q: Does Cravelle work with individuals or only organisations?
faq2A: We work with both individuals and organisations, tailoring our approach to each engagement. Our services are selective, focusing on situations where our involvement can be constructive.

consultingDesc: Considered advice and background support for parties engaged in international relations or cross border discussions.

documentTranslationDesc: Careful translation of legal, business, and technical documents by qualified professionals. Certification available where applicable.
interpretationDesc: Real time interpretation support for meetings, conferences, and formal events.
personalAssistantDesc: Multilingual coordination and support for executives and professionals requiring dedicated assistance.
confidentialServicesDesc: Discreet support arrangements with an emphasis on privacy and careful handling.
personalizedCareDesc: Individually structured support adapted to specific circumstances and preferences.
vipSupportDesc: Dedicated coordination for individuals and families requiring focused, private support.
webDevelopmentDesc: Website and application development using contemporary tools and considered design.
brandingDesc: Support in developing a cohesive visual and verbal identity for your organisation or project.

voiceOverDesc: Professional narration in multiple languages for commercial, corporate, and creative projects.
audioProductionDesc: Recording, editing, and production services for audio content.
podcastProductionDesc: End to end podcast support from planning through to publication and distribution.
b2bRepresentationDesc: Professional support in representing organisations to potential partners in international markets.
strategicPartnershipsDesc: Coordination and introductions to support the development of business relationships over time.
networkDevelopmentDesc: Considered introductions and relationship building within professional networks.
universityPlacementDesc: Support in researching, shortlisting, and applying to universities. Admission decisions are made by institutions.
applicationSupportDesc: Assistance with preparing applications, personal statements, and supporting documents.
visaAssistanceDesc: Information and support for student visa applications. Decisions are made by the relevant authorities.
thankYouMessage: Your message has been received. We typically respond within 48 business hours.
tradeEuMenaDesc: Cross-border trade coordination between the EU and the Middle East and North Africa, including sourcing, logistics, and market entry support.
tradeWhatWeDoDesc: We coordinate between European suppliers and MENA-based buyers (and vice versa), supporting the full lifecycle of a trade relationship.
tradeProductSourcingDesc: We identify verified suppliers in Poland and the EU for MENA importers, and connect EU exporters with vetted distributors in the GCC, Levant, and North Africa.
tradeLogisticsDesc: Full shipment coordination including freight forwarding quotes, customs documentation support, and Incoterms advisory.
tradeRegulatoryDesc: Help with EU CE marking, import/export permits, halal certification requirements, and country-specific trade regulations.
tradeMarketEntryDesc: Market research, competitor mapping, and go-to-market planning for businesses looking to enter EU or MENA markets.
tradeBilingualDesc: Contract translation, meeting interpretation, and culturally adapted communications in English, Arabic, Polish, and Turkish.
tradeSectorFoodDesc: Halal-certified food products, dairy, confectionery, Polish specialities, and packaged FMCG for Middle Eastern markets.
tradeSectorConstructionDesc: European-grade steel, ceramics, fixtures, and architectural materials sourced for Gulf region development projects.
tradeSectorCosmeticsDesc: European cosmetics and skincare brands looking for MENA distribution, including help with local labelling and import regulations.
tradeSectorIndustrialDesc: Machinery, spare parts, and industrial supplies from Eastern European manufacturers to MENA-based industrial buyers.
tradeSectorTextilesDesc: EU textile sourcing and private-label manufacturing support for MENA retail and fashion brands.
tradeHowWeWorkDesc: A clear, step-by-step approach to every trade engagement.
tradeStep1Desc: We start with a consultation to understand your product, target market, volume, and timeline.
tradeStep2Desc: We research the relevant market, find qualified suppliers or buyers, and prepare a shortlist with verified references.
tradeStep3Desc: We handle introductions, support price and terms negotiations, and arrange virtual or in-person meetings.
tradeStep4Desc: We coordinate shipping, documentation, customs clearance, and delivery on your behalf.
tradeStep5Desc: Ongoing relationship management, quality follow-up, and repeat-order coordination for long-term partnerships.
tradeDisclaimer1: Cravelle acts as a commercial intermediary and trade coordination provider. We do not hold inventory, act as a licensed customs broker, or serve as a party to any sales or purchase contract between buyer and seller.
tradeDisclaimer2: All product sourcing, logistics, and regulatory guidance services are provided on a best-effort coordination basis. Cravelle does not guarantee the outcome of any trade transaction and is not liable for goods, shipping delays, or third-party compliance failures.
tradeDisclaimer3: Clients should conduct their own due diligence and seek independent legal and financial advice where appropriate. Our services are subject to our general Terms & Conditions.
tradeContactDesc: Interested in EU-MENA trade services? Tell us about your requirements and we will get back to you.
tradeFormMessagePh: Tell us about your trade requirements.

adminDrivingLicenceDesc: Coordination and guidance through the process of obtaining a driving licence in Poland. Final decisions and approvals rest with official authorities.
adminVehicleRegDesc: Assistance with vehicle registration documentation and procedures. We do not sell or purchase vehicles on behalf of clients.
adminResidencySupportDesc: Guidance on PESEL registration and meldunek procedures for residential address documentation. Approvals depend on relevant institutions.
adminCompanyFormationDesc: Support in understanding company formation documentation and requirements in Poland. Administrative decisions remain with official bodies.
realEstateSearchDesc: Guidance on exploring available options aligned with your requirements and location preferences.
realEstateViewingDesc: Assistance in organizing property viewings and visits, with support in arrangement and scheduling.
realEstateDocumentsDesc: Guidance in preparing and understanding documents involved in property exploration and agreements. Final decisions remain with clients.

trainingSubtitle: Professional development courses designed to complement our internship programmes. Build expertise in technology, business, diplomacy, and communication.
trainingCourse1Desc: Learn the fundamentals of cybersecurity including threat analysis, network security, and ethical hacking practices. Ideal for those pursuing a career in IT security.
trainingCourse2Desc: Explore artificial intelligence concepts, supervised and unsupervised learning, neural networks, and real-world applications of machine learning.
trainingCourse3Desc: Master data analysis, visualisation, and statistical methods. Work with Python, SQL, and business intelligence tools to extract meaningful insights from data.
trainingCourse4Desc: Learn SEO, social media marketing, content strategy, and paid advertising. Build a complete digital marketing plan from concept to execution.
trainingCourse5Desc: Understand global trade dynamics, cross-border regulations, supply chain management, and strategies for expanding businesses internationally.
trainingCourse6Desc: Learn financial modelling, valuation techniques, portfolio management, and how to analyse investment opportunities in global markets.
trainingCourse7Desc: From ideation to execution — learn how to build a business plan, secure funding, manage operations, and scale a startup in the European and MENA markets.
trainingCourse8Desc: Master project planning, Agile and Waterfall methodologies, risk management, and stakeholder communication for successful project delivery.
trainingCourse9Desc: Study diplomatic protocols, international organisations, conflict resolution, and the geopolitical landscape of EU–MENA relations.
trainingCourse10Desc: Explore commercial contracts, trade regulations, intellectual property, dispute resolution, and the legal frameworks governing international business.
trainingCourse11Desc: Analyse political systems, public policy formation, governance structures, and the role of institutions in shaping international cooperation.
trainingCourse12Desc: Develop professional translation skills including legal, business, and technical translation. Learn interpretation techniques for conferences and meetings.
trainingCourse13Desc: Navigate cultural differences in professional settings. Learn negotiation styles, communication norms, and etiquette across European and Middle Eastern cultures.
trainingCourse14Desc: Build expertise in media relations, crisis communication, brand management, and developing effective PR campaigns for international audiences.
trainingDisclaimer1: Courses are currently under development. Enrolment and pricing will be announced soon.
trainingDisclaimer2: Certificates are issued by CRAVELLE sp. z o.o. and do not represent accredited academic qualifications.
trainingDisclaimer3: Course content, duration, and availability are subject to change without prior notice.
trainingDisclaimer4: These courses are designed to complement our internship programmes but can be taken independently.
